message:
🐛 Add fork guards to nightly workflow schedules (#2357)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   build:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     defaults:
@@ -62,6 +63,7 @@ jobs:
   # ── Compliance Suites ────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
   compliance:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Compliance (${{ matrix.suite }})
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -190,6 +192,7 @@ jobs:
   # ── Performance Suites ───────────────────────────────────────────────
 
   perf:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Perf (${{ matrix.suite }})
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -315,7 +318,7 @@ jobs:
   report:
     name: Report & Create Issues
     needs: [compliance, perf]
-    if: always()
+    if: always() && github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4

@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ concurrency:
 
 jobs:
   health-check:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     name: Dashboard Health Check
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 20

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ env:
 
 jobs:
   test:
+    if: github.repository == 'kubestellar/console'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 90
     steps:
